stages.title: Intent Intake
stages.summary: Understand target agent goal, delivery bar, authority boundary, and non-goals.
stages.goal: Produce intent and acceptance-criteria refs for a target OPL-compatible agent.

stages.title: Web Experience Research
stages.summary: Research public patterns, tools, data needs, workflow decomposition, and quality gates.
stages.goal: Produce source refs and reusable pattern dispositions for target agent design.

stages.title: Stage Decomposition
stages.summary: Turn target work into OPL stage descriptors, action metadata, memory refs, and artifact locators.
stages.goal: Produce a declarative domain pack for a candidate target agent.

stages.title: Agent Skeleton Build
stages.summary: Generate an OPL-compatible candidate agent repo/package using OPL scaffold surfaces.
stages.goal: Generate a baseline candidate agent package and validate its scaffold.

stages.title: Eval Suite Build
stages.summary: Create Agent Lab task manifests, recovery probes, scorecard refs, and promotion gates.
stages.goal: Create an OPL Agent Lab suite for the candidate or external agent.

stages.title: Baseline Run
stages.summary: Run the candidate agent through OPL Agent Lab and collect trajectories, receipts, and failure taxonomy.
stages.goal: Turn Agent Lab results into auditable baseline run refs.

stages.title: External Agent Takeover
stages.summary: Read an existing OPL-compatible agent descriptor/contracts, generate an Agent Lab external suite, run gated testing takeover, and record a self-evolution candidate without assuming target-domain authority.
stages.goal: Take over testing orchestration for an existing compatible agent while preserving its owner authority.

stages.title: Optimizer Iteration
stages.summary: Generate prompt, skill, stage-policy, tool-policy, few-shot, or rubric-gap candidates, patch target agent source when gated, and rerun suites.
stages.goal: Produce and execute gated target-agent mechanism improvements while preserving target domain truth authority.

stages.title: Baseline Delivery
stages.summary: Deliver a versioned baseline agent with docs, contracts, tests, runbook, and boundary receipt.
stages.goal: Package a baseline target agent and its owner receipt refs.

stages.title: Online Learning
stages.summary: Convert real trajectories into reviewed datasets, mechanism patch proposals, and future candidate refs.
stages.goal: Produce gated online-learning candidate and mechanism patch proposal refs.

notes: OPL Framework owns generated CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry/tool descriptors for this stage plane.
This repo owns agent-building stage semantics and owner receipt refs only.
